title: Angry
description: Defines the entity's 'angry' state using a timer.

broadcastAnger.description: Whether anger is broadcast to other entities of the same type.

broadcastRange.description: The range in blocks within which the broadcast is heard.

calm_event.description: The event to run when the entity stops being angry.

duration.description: The duration in seconds the entity will stay angry.

duration_delta.description: Random variance (in seconds) added to the duration.
